features: HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL：The exfoliating bath gloves are made of 100% viscose fiber, which is safe and harmless, effectively exfoliating and making your skin smoother and tenderer.

DEEP EXFOLIATION：Double-sided exfoliating gloves feel comfortable and safe on the skin, can deeply remove dirt, dead skin and impurities from the skin, prevent and remove ingrown hairs, the glove area is large enough to allow you to quickly cleanse your body , helps to soften and rejuvenate the skin.

WHOLE BODY AVAILABLE：The exfoliating scrub gloves is perfect for men and women to use all over the body. Regular use can improve blood circulation, promote skin metabolism, and is ideal for scrubbing in the shower. Can be used as a back, leg, arm and foot scrubber for smoother skin.

PERFECT SIZE：The size is 14.5*21cm/6x 8.3 inches, which fits most hands. The elastic wrist fits comfortably without deforming and slipping. The gloves are designed for a perfect fit on either the left or right hand, making it easy to reach and scrub every part of the body.

EASY TO USE：First soak your body in warm water for a few minutes, then soak your bath exfoliating gloves, put them on your hands, and add an appropriate amount of body wash to wipe your body. There is a small loop on the glove so you can hang it to dry after each wash to keep you dry.
